title: rubus × neogardicus
intro: Rubus × neogardicus, a hybrid of the Rubus genus, is a cross between the black raspberry and the red raspberry. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × neogardicus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer. Rubus × neogardicus can be prepared as a juice, tea, or supplement, making it a popular choice among herbalists and health enthusiasts.
